title: T-043 — Allergen changeover runtime endpoints + START-gate evaluator (08-PROD-g, §8.2.6 / FR-08-E7-001)
prompt:
# T-043 — Allergen changeover runtime endpoints + START-gate evaluator

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.2.6, §6 D10, §7.7 FR-08-E7-001..008, §7.1 FR-08-E1-001
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the cleaning-step, ATP result and dual sign-off endpoints backing `allergen_changeover_validations` (T-007) and wire the `allergen_changeover_gate_v1` DSL rule (T-014) into the START service (T-016) so START returns 423 with a typed redirect when a required changeover is incomplete.

## Implementation contract
1. `packages/api-services/production/allergen-changeover.ts` exports `evaluateChangeoverGate(woId)` (compute allergen_delta vs previous WO on the line from changeover_matrix), `recordCleaningStep`, `recordAtpResult`, `recordSignOff`.
2. `POST /api/production/changeover-events/[id]/cleaning-step` — `{ step_id, operator_id, timestamp, photo_url? }` writes `changeover_checklist_items.completed=true`.
3. `POST /api/production/changeover-events/[id]/atp-result` — `{ test_method, locations[], rlu_value, status }`; auto-PASS/FAIL vs configured `prod_settings.atp_rlu_threshold`.
4. `POST /api/production/changeover-events/[id]/sign-off` — `{ signer_role (shift_lead|quality_lead), user_id, pin_confirmed, timestamp }`; verifies PIN server-side, writes a row in `changeover_gate_signatures`.
5. Modify `packages/api-services/production/start-wo.ts` so it calls `evaluateChangeoverGate` after the canonical release preflight (T-001); on `cleaning_required` / `atp_required` / dual-sign-off incomplete, returns `423 { error: 'allergen_changeover_required', changeover_event_id, redirect_url: '/production/changeover/<event_id>' }` and does not mutate runtime state. `segregation_required=true` is a hard-block that cannot be overridden in Production.

## Files
- packages/api-services/production/allergen-changeover.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/changeover-events/[id]/cleaning-step/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/changeover-events/[id]/atp-result/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/changeover-events/[id]/sign-off/route.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/start-wo.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/allergen-changeover.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/start-wo-allergen-gate.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a WO whose changeover requires cleaning + ATP and dual sign-off is incomplete, when POST START is called, then the service returns 423 with `error='allergen_changeover_required'`, `changeover_event_id`, and `redirect_url='/production/changeover/<id>'`, and no `wo_executions.started_at` is written.
2. Given cleaning checklist is complete and an ATP result with `rlu_value <= prod_settings.atp_rlu_threshold` plus both shift_lead + quality_lead PIN-confirmed sign-offs exist, when POST START is called, then START succeeds without selecting a newer BOM/spec and using the existing canonical `active_bom_header_id` + `active_factory_spec_id`.
3. Given `segregation_required=true` in the changeover matrix row, when sign-off is attempted or START is invoked, then the service returns a typed `segregation_hard_block` blocker and cannot be overridden in Production.

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/api-services/production/__tests__/allergen-changeover.test.ts + start-wo-allergen-gate.test.ts asserting 423/redirect, dual-sign-off pass, and segregation hard-block before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run packages/api-services/production/__tests__/allergen-changeover.test.ts packages/api-services/production/__tests__/start-wo-allergen-gate.test.ts`
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow sign-off without server-side PIN verification (BRCGS Issue 10 §5.3).
- Do not let Production override `segregation_required` — that originates in 07-PLANNING-EXT changeover_matrix and 03-TECHNICAL allergen profile.
- Do not select a newer/latest BOM/spec at START time after passing the allergen gate; preserve canonical snapshot per T-001.
- Do not delete or mutate prior `allergen_changeover_validations` rows (7-year retention per §5.5).

pipeline_inputs.description: Cleaning-step/ATP/dual sign-off endpoints + allergen_changeover_gate_v1 wiring into START so blocked changeovers return 423 redirect without mutating runtime.
pipeline_inputs.details: Evaluator reads previous WO on the line, computes allergen_delta vs current WO's factory_spec/BOM allergen profile, consults changeover_matrix (07-PLANNING-EXT §9.4), and decides cleaning_required/atp_required/dual_signoff_required/segregation_required. Cleaning/ATP/sign-off endpoints are idempotent (transaction_id) and PIN-verified server-side against users.pin_hash. START service first runs canonical release preflight (T-001), then calls evaluateChangeoverGate. Segregation is a hard-block originating in 03-TECHNICAL allergen profile + 07-PLANNING-EXT changeover_matrix and cannot be overridden in Production.
out_of_scope: Do not implement the changeover UI / dual sign-off panel (T-048)
Do not own the changeover_matrix table (07-PLANNING-EXT §9.4)
Do not implement ATP device integration (P2 via 09-QUALITY)
Do not change allergen profile schema (03-TECHNICAL §10.4)
acceptance_criteria: Given a WO whose changeover requires cleaning+ATP and dual sign-off is incomplete, when POST START is called, then service returns 423 with error='allergen_changeover_required', changeover_event_id and redirect_url, and no wo_executions.started_at is written.

Given cleaning complete + ATP rlu_value<=threshold + both shift_lead+quality_lead PIN-confirmed sign-offs, when POST START is called, then START succeeds without selecting a newer BOM/spec and using the existing canonical active_bom_header_id+active_factory_spec_id.
Given segregation_required=true, when sign-off is attempted or START is invoked, then service returns typed segregation_hard_block and cannot be overridden in Production.
test_strategy: RED: __tests__/allergen-changeover.test.ts + start-wo-allergen-gate.test.ts asserting 423 redirect, dual-sign-off pass and segregation hard-block before code exists.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow sign-off without server-side PIN verification.
Do not let Production override segregation_required.
Do not select a newer/latest BOM/spec at START time after passing the allergen gate.
Do not delete or mutate prior allergen_changeover_validations rows.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Allergen profile + factory spec source of truth.
